name: Norwood Systems Limited
analysis: NOR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (5.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0150. Trade idea: entry A$0.0300, stop A$0.0089, target A$0.0933 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
